name: Brigitte's Hamburger Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in margarine until golden brown.
Stir in meat, garlic, flour, paprika, salt and pepper, and mushrooms; saute 5 minutes.
2. Add soup (undiluted); simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
Stir in sour cream or buttermilk and sprinkle with parsley.
Serve over rice, noodles, or toast.
Source: Brigitte Sealing, Cyberealm BBS Watertown NY, 1992
Typed for you by: Linda Fields, Cyberealm BBS Watertown NY, 315-786-1120
